figure_descriptions.adapter_norm_ranking: Grouped bars comparing average LoRA A and LoRA B norms per task.
figure_descriptions.adapter_norm_attention_vs_mlp: Module-family split showing how attention and MLP norms differ by task.
figure_descriptions.adapter_layer_heatmap_A: Two-panel heatmap of per-layer LoRA A norms across tasks for attention and MLP modules.
figure_descriptions.adapter_depth_trends: Depth profiles of mean LoRA A norms by task for attention and MLP families.
figure_descriptions.adapter_perf_vs_norm: Exploratory scatter comparing combined norm magnitude with normalized standalone performance.
